languages.text: "И что вы собираетесь делать дальше? У меня больше нет секретов от вас".
"What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."
languages.original_text: "И что вы собираетесь делать дальше? У меня больше нет секретов от вас".

traits.locale_text: "What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."
"What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."
"What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."

languages.text: «¿Qué hará ahora? No tengo más secretos que ocultarle».
languages.original_text: "What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué hará ahora? No tengo más secretos que ocultarle».

languages.text: “您现在打算怎么做？我对您已经没有秘密了。”
languages.original_text: "What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."

traits.locale_text: “您现在打算怎么做？我对您已经没有秘密了。”

languages.text: « Que comptez-vous faire, à présent ? Je n'ai plus aucun secret pour vous. »
languages.original_text: "What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."

traits.locale_text: « Que comptez-vous faire, à présent ? Je n'ai plus aucun secret pour vous. »

languages.text: "Şimdi ne olacak? Tüm sırlarımı ortaya döktüm."
languages.original_text: "What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi ne olacak? Tüm sırlarımı ortaya döktüm."

languages.text: "Was werdet Ihr jetzt machen? Ich habe keine Geheimnisse mehr vor Euch."
languages.original_text: "What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."

traits.locale_text: "Was werdet Ihr jetzt machen? Ich habe keine Geheimnisse mehr vor Euch."

languages.text: 「これからどうするつもりですか？もう秘密はない」
languages.original_text: "What are you going to do now? I have no more secrets from you."

traits.locale_text: 「これからどうするつもりですか？もう秘密はない」
